output_debit_classifier.reason: This is a debt-to-equity conversion. The bank loan payable of $200 is extinguished (debit to reduce the liability), and 400 common shares are issued in exchange (credit to equity). The conversion is recorded at the carrying amount of the debt ($200). Under IFRS, the transaction is a direct exchange with no gain or loss recognized. The entry reflects the elimination of the liability and the corresponding increase in share capital.
